FAILED_LOGIN.name: Brute Force
FAILED_LOGIN.description: Repeated attempts to guess passwords for one or more accounts.

FAILED_LOGIN.name: Password Spraying
FAILED_LOGIN.description: Attempts a few common passwords across many accounts.

FAILED_LOGIN.name: Credential Stuffing
FAILED_LOGIN.description: Uses previously leaked username and password combinations.

SUCCESSFUL_LOGIN.name: Valid Accounts
SUCCESSFUL_LOGIN.description: Use of legitimate credentials to access systems.

INVALID_USER.name: Gather Victim Identity Information
INVALID_USER.description: Attempts to enumerate usernames or identities.

AUTH_FAILURE.name: Brute Force
AUTH_FAILURE.description: Authentication failures that may indicate password guessing.

CONNECTION_REFUSED.name: Network Service Discovery
CONNECTION_REFUSED.description: Scanning services and ports to identify reachable systems.

PORT_SCAN.name: Network Service Discovery
PORT_SCAN.description: Scanning ports to identify available network services.

MALWARE_DOWNLOAD.name: Ingress Tool Transfer
MALWARE_DOWNLOAD.description: Downloading malware or tools onto a compromised system.

FILE_DOWNLOAD.name: Ingress Tool Transfer
FILE_DOWNLOAD.description: Transfer of files or payloads to a target host.

PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION.name: Exploitation for Privilege Escalation
PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION.description: Exploiting vulnerabilities to gain higher privileges.

COMMAND_EXECUTION.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
COMMAND_EXECUTION.description: Execution of shell commands or scripts.

DNS_REQUEST.name: DNS
DNS_REQUEST.description: DNS used as an application layer protocol.

HTTP_REQUEST.name: Web Protocols
HTTP_REQUEST.description: HTTP or HTTPS communication for command and control.

SQL_INJECTION.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
SQL_INJECTION.description: Exploitation of internet-facing applications, including SQL injection.

XSS.name: JavaScript
XSS.description: Execution of malicious JavaScript in a browser.

RANSOMWARE.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
RANSOMWARE.description: Encryption of files to disrupt operations.

DATA_EXFILTRATION.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
DATA_EXFILTRATION.description: Data exfiltration through an established command and control channel.
